feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Data Services
feed.subtitle: SAP Data Services Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to find the SAP Data Services Installation Guide for Unix
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Can you please provide the complete documents for installing the SAP Data Services for the version 4.2 and 4.3 which is installing on SUSE Linux Server.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: A DS Job taking very long time
entry.content:
Hi All

 

A DS Job taking 11-18 Hours to complete and it retrieves arounds 115550635 row count.

What are the areas needs to be checked to reduce the execution time.

 

BR

sIBA

entry.title: Is starrocks database supported with SAP Data Services?
entry.content:
• Is starrocks database supported with SAP Data Services?
  • Getting ODBC error when trying to connect to starrocks database from SAP Data Services Designer.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to download latest SAP Data Services version?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

we want to download latest SAP data service version, could you please provide us the link to download? thank you.

Best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP data services connection with MySQL 8.X
entry.content:
Need to connect SAP data services to MySQL 8.X 

Question and Answer:
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Database datastores

Q: What version of SAP Data Services are you using?
A: 4.2

Q: What is the database type and version? And what is the database client version installed on your server?
A: sybase 16


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Rep Schedule in DS Mgmt Console
entry.content:
Hi All

Please anyone let me know whats the function of Repository Schedules in DS Management Console

 

BR

Siba

entry.title: BODS v4.3 performance issue with SQL Server
entry.content:
Hello,

We recently upgraded to BODS v4.3 and since then the job has taken almost 5 times more than usual to complete for Full load.

I checked on BODS v4.2 and it used to take around 8 hours to complete the full load.

We are using SQL Server database.

entry.title: Issue with JSON File creation as an Output
entry.content:
We are planning to create an output JSON file through BODS which is using a target template attached in the email below, reading data from relational table.
Issues we are facing 
  1. We are unable to keep the names to be exactly the same for all of the Hierarchical Data nodes (ArticleGroupID,ParentArticleGroupId, ArticleGroupDescription ) in the output file as we receive errors complaining about naming them different.
  2. Output structure is coming out the way we want, but it is repeating itself number of times source rows are there 
     
Source Query result is shown in color coding for the various levels deep in the data and finally it's the leaf.
 
Output File Template
{
  "ArticleGroup": [
    {
      "ArticleGroupID": "PD00009125",
      "ParentArticleGroupId": null,
      "ArticleGroupDescription": "Digital Product Game",
      "ArticleGroup": [
        {
          "ArticleGroupID": "PD00016135",
          "ParentArticleGroupId": "PD00009125",
          "ArticleGroupDescription": "Integration Game",
          "ArticleGroup": [
            {
              "ArticleGroupID": "PD00023331",
              "ParentArticleGroupId": "PD00016135",
              "ArticleGroupDescription": "Integration Game - Mobile",
              "ArticleGroup": [
                {
                  "ArticleGroupID": "PD00020400",
                  "ParentArticleGroupId": "PD00023331",
                  "ArticleGroupDescription": "Integration Game - Mobile - City Builder",
                  "Articles": [
                    {
                      "ArticleID": "PD00020401",
                      "ArticleDescription": "Integration Game - Mobile - City Builder - Ad Supported"
                    },
                    {
                      "ArticleID": "PD00020402",
                      "ArticleDescription": "Integration Game - Mobile - City Builder - Cosmetics"
                    },
                    {
                      "ArticleID": "PD00020403",
                      "ArticleDescription": "Integration Game - Mobile - City Builder - Crypto / NFT"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              ]
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

entry.title: SAP Data services
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are currently using SAP Data services 4.2 SP 14 Patch 5 and OS RHEL 7.9

Since RHEL 7.9 will end on 30th June, upgrading the OS to RHEL 8.9.

My question is will SAP Data services 4.2 SP 14 Patch 5 work on RHEL 8.9

Please provide your inputs 

Thank you

entry.title: "Failed to copy DSConfig.txt" message appearing during silent install
entry.content:
I'm using the below batch file to install SAP Data Services 4.2

start /wait %~dp0setup.exe -q InstallDir="c:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\" SelectedLanguagePacks="en" ProductKey=XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX DSConfigASSelection=skip DSConfigCMSSelection=skip DSConfigMergeSelection=skip ISCommonDirChanged=0 Features=DataServicesClient,DataServicesDesigner,DataServicesDataDirect,DataServicesDocumentation

It seems to install fine but shows a popup at the end which says "Failed to copy DSConfig.txt from 'c:\program files (x86)\SAPBusinessObjects\Data Services\conf' to '\conf'.  Copy the file manually after installation completes."

I specified -q in the install so it should be suppressing all popups.  How do I prevent this message?

entry.title: PG 16 compatibility with DS 4.3
entry.content: We would like to know from which DS 4.3 version (which SP/Patch) there will be compatibility with PostgreSQL 16 (currently only compatible with PG 15 according to PAM)?

entry.title: Data services job taking 6-9 Hrs
entry.content:
Hi Team,

A recurring jobs running for every 4 hours. But each of it's execution took 6 to 9 Hrs to complete successfully. Because of this, many times some executions are running in parallel i.e., if one execution not finished in 4 Hrs , then the next execution will start after 4 Hrs so there will be  2 executions runs in parallel which could impact performane as well as end user not getting data on time. So kindly suggest on this.

Regards

Siba

entry.title: How to Schedule the job via WSDL with the help of SoapUI tool
entry.content:
How to Schedule the job via WSDL with the help of SoapUI tool

a. we need to Schedule job for particular day and Time
b. Schedule job with Global variable

entry.title: BODS Job Stored Procedure
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is a recurring bods job contains 4 stored procedures. so once the job completed sucessfully, all these 4 procedures should be executed sucessfully and this can be traced in Job Trace Log. But out of 4 Stored procedures, only 2 procedures are showing as excuted state in trace log but remaining 2 other procedures was  not showing for 1 week pssibly because there was a job server shutdown during weekend. but all 4 Sr Procs are shoing in executed state in trace log after 1 week again. But the job ran with below error. Here the function call indicates the 4th St Proc which I marked as blank.

Please anyone let me know on this...

 

 

Regards,

Siba

entry.title: Data Services nest and unnest produce input ^2 records
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to call a SAP RFC function with table input parameter

to call the function, I create a new schema in my query based on my input table ( 5 records ) and pass this to SAP function.

when I start the dataflow, the output creates 25 records ( 5^2 )

I delete the function and unnest the nested query 20, same result, 25 records...

What is the problem?

 

Thx for your help

Holger

entry.title: To get records for last 120days(4 Moths) in BODS
entry.content:
Hi All

Need to see records for last 4 Months(120 Days) , this condition I need to apply in query transformation where clause in Designer based on a Date field-ERDAT which contains values in format: yyyy.mm.dd 

I tried to use below condition but bods not permitting this condition:

ERDAT >=  dateadd( day, -120, CURRENT_DATE());

Please anyone assist me on this .

Regards,

Siba

entry.title: OS compatibility
entry.content:
we are using the SAP Data Services on SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 11 SP4 and would like to upgrade the OS version to 15 SP5 . could you guys please let us if that is compatible version of SAP data services 4.2


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Question about RHEl support with SAP Data Services 4.3
entry.content:
In the SAP Data Services 4.3 PAM it says RHEL 9.2 is first supported on SAP Data Services 4.3 SP03, however can we upgrade our current Data Services 4.2 system running on RHEL 8.8 to 4.3 SP03 without upgrading operating system to RHEL 9.2? We would like to stay on RHEL 8.8 for the time being.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Data Services Error Codes. What Do These Mean ?
entry.content:
We have a fairly simple SAPDS job that sends out TXT files via FTP. It fails sometimes with error codes, but I don't understand the cause, and what the codes mean. How can I get more useful info ?

For example:

Function call <exec ( cmd, D:\OutBound\BatchFiles\BatchFile02.bat, 0 ) > failed, due to error <50306>: <Function <exec>
failed to execute program <cmd D:\OutBound\BatchFiles\BatchFile02.bat>. Program terminated with exit code <13>.>.

entry.title: To know who made the changes in bods
entry.content:
Hi All

Suppose someone changed the existing job flow in bods designer or existing schedule of a ds console job / changed anything else then how to track that user?

Regards 

Siba
